name: gitlab_group_label_list
description:
List all labels for a GitLab group. Supports filtering by search keyword, including issue/MR counts (with_counts), ancestor/descendant groups, and group-only labels. Returns label name, color, description, open/closed issue counts, and MR counts with pagination.

Returns: JSON array of group labels with pagination. See also: gitlab_group_label_get.

only_group_labels.description: Only return group-level labels (exclude project labels)

with_counts.description: Include issue and merge request counts

name: gitlab_group_label_subscribe
description:
Subscribe to a group label to receive notifications when the label is applied to issues or merge requests.

Returns: JSON with the subscribed label details. See also: gitlab_group_label_get.

name: gitlab_group_label_unsubscribe
description:
Unsubscribe from a group label to stop receiving notifications.

Returns: JSON confirming unsubscription. See also: gitlab_group_label_get.

name: gitlab_group_label_update
description:
Update an existing group label. Can change name, color, description, or priority. Only specified fields are modified.

Returns: JSON with the updated label details. See also: gitlab_group_label_get.

color.description: New label color in hex format

name: gitlab_group_ldap_link_add
description:
Add an LDAP group link to a GitLab group (by CN or filter).

Returns: created LDAP link details. See also: gitlab_group_ldap_link_list, gitlab_group_ldap_link_delete.

name: gitlab_group_ldap_link_delete
description:
Delete a group LDAP link by CN or filter.

Returns: confirmation of deletion. See also: gitlab_group_ldap_link_list, gitlab_group_ldap_link_delete_for_provider.

name: gitlab_group_ldap_link_delete_for_provider
description:
Delete a group LDAP link for a specific provider.

Returns: confirmation of deletion. See also: gitlab_group_ldap_link_list, gitlab_group_ldap_link_delete.

name: gitlab_group_ldap_link_list
description:
List all LDAP group links for a GitLab group.

Returns: list of LDAP links with CN, filter, access level, and provider. See also: gitlab_group_ldap_link_add, gitlab_group_saml_link_list.

name: gitlab_group_list
description:
List GitLab groups accessible to the authenticated user. Supports filtering by search term, ownership, and top-level only. Returns paginated results including group name, path, visibility, and web URL.

Returns: paginated list of groups with id, name, path, full_path, visibility, web_url, and parent_id. See also: gitlab_group_get, gitlab_project_list.

all_available.description: Show all groups accessible by the authenticated user

order_by.description: Order groups by field (name, path, id, similarity)

owned.description: Limit to groups explicitly owned by the authenticated user

search.description: Filter groups by name or path

skip_groups.description: Group IDs to exclude from results

with_custom_attributes.description: Include custom attributes in the response

name: gitlab_group_member_add
description:
Add a member to a GitLab group. Specify user by user_id or username, and set access level (10=Guest, 20=Reporter, 30=Developer, 40=Maintainer, 50=Owner). Optionally set expiration date.

Returns: JSON with the added member details. See also: gitlab_group_member_list, gitlab_get_user.

name: gitlab_group_member_edit
description:
Edit a member of a GitLab group. Update access level or expiration date for an existing member.

Returns: JSON with the updated member details. See also: gitlab_group_member_get.

name: gitlab_group_member_get
description:
Get a single member of a GitLab group by user ID. Returns user details including access level, state, and expiration date.

Returns: JSON with member details including access level, state, and expiration. See also: gitlab_group_member_list.

name: gitlab_group_member_get_inherited
description:
Get a single inherited member of a GitLab group by user ID. Returns member details including access level inherited from parent groups.

Returns: JSON with inherited member details including access level. See also: gitlab_group_member_get.

name: gitlab_group_member_remove
description:
Remove a member from a GitLab group. Optionally skip subresource removal and unassign issuables.

Returns: JSON confirming member removal. See also: gitlab_group_member_list.

name: gitlab_group_members_list
description:
List all members of a GitLab group including inherited members. Returns user ID, username, name, state, access level (10=Guest, 20=Reporter, 30=Developer, 40=Maintainer, 50=Owner), and web URL. Supports filtering by name/username query.

Returns: paginated list of members with user_id, username, name, state, access_level, and web_url. See also: gitlab_group_get, gitlab_group_list.

query.description: Filter members by name or username

name: gitlab_group_milestone_burndown_events
description:
List all burndown chart events for a group milestone. Returns event timestamps, weights, and actions with pagination.

Returns: JSON array of burndown chart events. See also: gitlab_group_milestone_get.

milestone_iid.description: Milestone IID (group-scoped). Use gitlab_group_milestone_list to find IIDs,required

name: gitlab_group_milestone_create
description:
Create a new milestone in a GitLab group with a title, optional description, start date and due date (YYYY-MM-DD).

Returns: JSON with the created milestone details. See also: gitlab_group_milestone_get.

name: gitlab_group_milestone_delete
description:
Delete a group milestone by IID.

Returns: confirmation message. See also: gitlab_group_milestone_list.

milestone_iid.description: Milestone IID (group-scoped). Use gitlab_group_milestone_list to find IIDs,required

name: gitlab_group_milestone_get
description:
Get details of a single group milestone by IID, including title, state, start/due dates, and timestamps.

Returns: JSON with group milestone details. See also: gitlab_group_milestone_list.

milestone_iid.description: Milestone IID (group-scoped). Use gitlab_group_milestone_list to find IIDs,required

name: gitlab_group_milestone_issues
description:
List all issues assigned to a group milestone. Returns issue ID, IID, title, state, and web URL with pagination.

Returns: JSON array of issues for the milestone with pagination. See also: gitlab_group_milestone_get, gitlab_issue_list.

milestone_iid.description: Milestone IID (group-scoped). Use gitlab_group_milestone_list to find IIDs,required

name: gitlab_group_milestone_list
description:
List all milestones for a GitLab group. Supports filtering by state, title, search, IIDs, date ranges, and ancestor/descendant groups. Returns milestone title, state, dates, and pagination.

Returns: JSON array of group milestones with pagination. See also: gitlab_group_milestone_get.

search.description: Search milestones by title or description

name: gitlab_group_milestone_merge_requests
description:
List all merge requests assigned to a group milestone. Returns MR ID, IID, title, state, source/target branches with pagination.

Returns: JSON array of merge requests for the milestone with pagination. See also: gitlab_group_milestone_get, gitlab_mr_list.

milestone_iid.description: Milestone IID (group-scoped). Use gitlab_group_milestone_list to find IIDs,required

name: gitlab_group_milestone_update
description:
Update an existing group milestone. Can change title, description, dates, or state (activate/close). Only specified fields are modified.

Returns: JSON with the updated milestone details. See also: gitlab_group_milestone_get.

milestone_iid.description: Milestone IID (group-scoped). Use gitlab_group_milestone_list to find IIDs,required

name: gitlab_group_projects
description:
List projects belonging to a GitLab group. Supports filtering by search, archived status, visibility, and including subgroup projects. Returns project name, path, visibility, and archived status with pagination.

Returns: paginated list of projects with id, name, path, visibility, and archived status. See also: gitlab_group_get, gitlab_project_list.

order_by.description: Order by field (id, name, path, created_at, updated_at, last_activity_at, similarity)

owned.description: Limit to projects owned by current user

name: gitlab_group_protected_branch_get
description:
Get a single group-level protected branch rule by name.

Returns: protected branch with access levels and settings. See also: gitlab_group_protected_branch_list, gitlab_group_protected_branch_update.

name: gitlab_group_protected_branch_list
description:
List all protected branches for a GitLab group.

Returns: paginated list of protected branch rules with access levels. See also: gitlab_group_protected_branch_get, gitlab_branch_protect, gitlab_list_branch_rules.

name: gitlab_group_protected_branch_protect
description:
Protect a branch at the group level.

Returns: created protected branch rule with access levels. See also: gitlab_group_protected_branch_list, gitlab_group_protected_branch_unprotect.

_destroy.description: Set true to remove this permission
Set true to remove this permission
Set true to remove this permission

name.description: Branch name or wildcard to protect,required

name: gitlab_group_protected_branch_unprotect
description:
Remove a group-level protected branch rule.

Returns: confirmation of removal. See also: gitlab_group_protected_branch_list, gitlab_group_protected_branch_protect.

branch.description: Branch name or wildcard to unprotect,required

name: gitlab_group_protected_branch_update
description:
Update a group-level protected branch rule.

Returns: updated protected branch with access levels. See also: gitlab_group_protected_branch_get, gitlab_group_protected_branch_protect.

_destroy.description: Set true to remove this permission
Set true to remove this permission
Set true to remove this permission

name: gitlab_group_protected_environment_get
description:
Get a single group-level protected environment by name.

Returns: protected environment with deploy access levels and approval rules. See also: gitlab_group_protected_environment_list, gitlab_group_protected_environment_update.

name: gitlab_group_protected_environment_list
description:
List all protected environments for a GitLab group.

Returns: paginated list of protected environments with deploy access levels and approval rules. See also: gitlab_group_protected_environment_get, gitlab_protected_environment_list, gitlab_environment_list.

name: gitlab_group_protected_environment_protect
description:
Protect an environment at the group level.

Returns: created protected environment with access levels and approval rules. See also: gitlab_group_protected_environment_list, gitlab_group_protected_environment_unprotect.

name: gitlab_group_protected_environment_unprotect
description:
Remove protection from a group-level environment.

Returns: confirmation of removal. See also: gitlab_group_protected_environment_list, gitlab_group_protected_environment_protect.

name: gitlab_group_protected_environment_update
description:
Update a group-level protected environment.

Returns: updated protected environment with access levels and approval rules. See also: gitlab_group_protected_environment_get, gitlab_group_protected_environment_protect.

_destroy.description: Set true to remove this rule

id.description: Existing approval rule ID to update

_destroy.description: Set true to remove this access level

id.description: Existing access level ID to update

name: gitlab_group_release_list
description:
List releases across all projects in a GitLab group.

Returns: paginated list of releases with tag, name, dates, and author. See also: gitlab_release_list, gitlab_group_list.

name: gitlab_group_restore
description:
Restore a GitLab group that was marked for deletion.

Returns: id, name, path, full_path, visibility, web_url, and parent_id.

See also: gitlab_group_get.

name: gitlab_group_saml_link_add
description:
Add a SAML group link to a GitLab group.

Returns: created SAML link details. See also: gitlab_group_saml_link_list, gitlab_group_saml_link_delete.

name: gitlab_group_saml_link_delete
description:
Delete a SAML group link from a GitLab group.

Returns: confirmation of deletion. See also: gitlab_group_saml_link_list, gitlab_group_saml_link_get.

saml_group_name.description: Name of the SAML group to delete,required

name: gitlab_group_saml_link_get
description:
Get a single SAML group link by name.

Returns: SAML link details with access level. See also: gitlab_group_saml_link_list, gitlab_group_saml_link_delete.

name: gitlab_group_saml_link_list
description:
List all SAML group links for a GitLab group.

Returns: list of SAML links with name, access level, and provider. See also: gitlab_group_saml_link_get, gitlab_group_saml_link_add, gitlab_group_ldap_link_list.

name: gitlab_group_search
description:
Search for GitLab groups by name. Returns matching groups with their details.

Returns: paginated list of groups with id, name, path, full_path, visibility, and web_url. See also: gitlab_group_get, gitlab_group_list.

name: gitlab_group_service_account_create
description:
Create a service account in a GitLab group (top-level only).

Returns: created service account details. See also: gitlab_group_service_account_list, gitlab_group_service_account_pat_create.

group_id.description: Group ID or URL-encoded path (top-level only),required

name: gitlab_group_service_account_delete
description:
Delete a service account from a GitLab group (top-level only).

Returns: confirmation of deletion. See also: gitlab_group_service_account_list, gitlab_group_service_account_create.

group_id.description: Group ID or URL-encoded path (top-level only),required

name: gitlab_group_service_account_list
description:
List all service accounts for a GitLab group.

Returns: paginated list of service accounts with ID, name, username, and email. See also: gitlab_group_service_account_create, gitlab_group_service_account_pat_list.

order_by.description: Order by id or username

name: gitlab_group_service_account_pat_create
description:
Create a personal access token for a group service account.

Returns: created PAT details including the token value (shown only once). See also: gitlab_group_service_account_pat_list, gitlab_group_service_account_pat_revoke.

name: gitlab_group_service_account_pat_list
description:
List personal access tokens for a group service account.

Returns: paginated list of PATs with ID, name, scopes, and status. See also: gitlab_group_service_account_pat_create, gitlab_group_service_account_list.

name: gitlab_group_service_account_pat_revoke
description:
Revoke a personal access token for a group service account.

Returns: confirmation of revocation. See also: gitlab_group_service_account_pat_list, gitlab_group_service_account_pat_create.

token_id.description: Personal access token ID to revoke,required

name: gitlab_group_service_account_update
description:
Update a service account in a GitLab group (top-level only).

Returns: updated service account details. See also: gitlab_group_service_account_list, gitlab_group_service_account_delete.

group_id.description: Group ID or URL-encoded path (top-level only),required

name: gitlab_group_share
description:
Share a GitLab group with another group, granting the shared group a specified access level. Optionally set an expiration date.

Returns: JSON with the group share details. See also: gitlab_group_get.

group_access.description: Access level for the shared group (10=Guest, 20=Reporter, 30=Developer, 40=Maintainer)

group_id.description: Group ID or URL-encoded path to share,required

name: gitlab_group_transfer_project
description:
Transfer a project into a group namespace. Moves the project to become a member of the specified group.

Returns: transferred project details with id, name, path, and namespace. See also: gitlab_group_get, gitlab_project_transfer.

project_id.description: Project ID or URL-encoded path to transfer,required

name: gitlab_group_unarchive
description:
Unarchive a previously archived GitLab group. Requires Owner role or administrator.

Returns: confirmation message. See also: gitlab_group_archive, gitlab_group_get.

name: gitlab_group_unshare
description:
Stop sharing a GitLab group with another group, removing the group-level access.

Returns: JSON confirming group unshare.

See also: gitlab_group_share.

share_group_id.description: Group ID to stop sharing with,required

name: gitlab_group_update
description: Update an existing GitLab group. Supports changing name, path, description, visibility, request_access_enabled, lfs_enabled, and default_branch. Returns: id, name, path, full_path, visibility, web_url, parent_id. See also: gitlab_group_get.

name: gitlab_group_variable_create
description: Create a new CI/CD variable in a GitLab group. Requires key and value. Optionally set type (env_var/file), protection, masking, and environment scope. Returns: key, value, variable_type, protected, masked, environment_scope. See also: gitlab_group_variable_list.

masked.description: Mask variable value in job logs

raw.description: Treat variable value as raw string

name: gitlab_group_variable_delete
description:
Delete a CI/CD variable from a GitLab group by key. Optionally filter by environment scope. This action cannot be undone.

Returns: confirmation message. See also: gitlab_group_variable_list.

name: gitlab_group_variable_get
description: Get a specific CI/CD variable by key from a GitLab group. Optionally filter by environment scope when duplicate keys exist. Returns: key, value, variable_type, protected, masked, environment_scope. See also: gitlab_group_variable_list.

name: gitlab_group_variable_list
description:
List CI/CD variables for a GitLab group. Returns paginated results with variable key, type, protection, masking, and environment scope.

Returns: paginated list of variables with key, variable_type, protected, masked, and environment_scope. See also: gitlab_group_variable_get.

name: gitlab_group_variable_update
description: Update an existing CI/CD variable in a GitLab group. Specify the key to update and any fields to change: value, type, protection, masking, environment scope. Returns: key, value, variable_type, protected, masked, environment_scope. See also: gitlab_group_variable_get.

masked.description: Mask variable value in job logs

raw.description: Treat variable value as raw string

name: gitlab_group_wiki_create
description:
Create a new wiki page in a GitLab group.

Returns: created wiki page with title, slug, format, and content. See also: gitlab_group_wiki_list, gitlab_group_wiki_edit.

format.description: Content format: markdown (default), rdoc, asciidoc, or org

name: gitlab_group_wiki_delete
description:
Delete a wiki page from a GitLab group.

Returns: confirmation of deletion. See also: gitlab_group_wiki_list, gitlab_group_wiki_get.

slug.description: URL-encoded slug of the wiki page to delete,required

name: gitlab_group_wiki_edit
description:
Edit an existing wiki page in a GitLab group.

Returns: updated wiki page with title, slug, format, and content. See also: gitlab_group_wiki_get, gitlab_group_wiki_create.

format.description: Content format: markdown, rdoc, asciidoc, or org

slug.description: URL-encoded slug of the wiki page to edit,required

name: gitlab_group_wiki_get
description:
Get a single wiki page from a GitLab group by slug.

Returns: wiki page with title, slug, format, content, and encoding. See also: gitlab_group_wiki_list, gitlab_group_wiki_edit.

slug.description: URL-encoded slug of the wiki page,required

name: gitlab_group_wiki_list
description:
List all wiki pages in a GitLab group. Optionally include page content.

Returns: list of wiki pages with title, slug, format, and encoding. See also: gitlab_group_wiki_get, gitlab_wiki_list.

with_content.description: Include page content in the response

name: gitlab_import_from_bitbucket_cloud
description:
Import a repository from Bitbucket Cloud into GitLab

Returns: JSON with import status (project ID, import status, import source).

See also: gitlab_import_from_bitbucket_server, gitlab_import_from_github

new_name.description: New name for the imported project

target_namespace.description: Target namespace for the imported project,required

name: gitlab_import_from_bitbucket_server
description:
Import a repository from Bitbucket Server into GitLab

Returns: JSON with import status (project ID, import status, import source).

See also: gitlab_import_from_bitbucket_cloud, gitlab_import_from_github

new_name.description: New name for the imported project

new_namespace.description: Target namespace for the imported project

name: gitlab_import_from_github
description:
Import a repository from GitHub into GitLab

Returns: JSON with import status (project ID, import status, import source).

See also: gitlab_cancel_github_import, gitlab_start_bulk_import

new_name.description: New name for the imported project

target_namespace.description: Target namespace for the imported project,required

name: gitlab_import_github_gists
description:
Import GitHub gists into GitLab snippets

Returns: JSON confirmation of gists import initiation.

See also: gitlab_import_from_github, gitlab_list_snippets

name: gitlab_import_group_from_file
description:
Import a group from an export archive file. Requires a local file path to the .tar.gz archive.

Returns: JSON with the import details.

See also: gitlab_schedule_group_export, gitlab_start_bulk_import

file.description: Absolute path to a local export archive (.tar.gz) on the MCP server filesystem,required

parent_id.description: ID of the parent group to import into

path.description: URL path for the imported group,required

name: gitlab_import_project_from_file
description:
Import a project from an export archive file. Accepts either a local file_path or base64-encoded content.

Returns: JSON with import status details.

See also: gitlab_get_project_import_status, gitlab_import_from_github

content_base64.description: Base64-encoded export archive content. Only one of file_path or content_base64 should be provided.

file_path.description: Absolute path to a local export archive (.tar.gz) on the MCP server filesystem. Only one of file_path or content_base64 should be provided.

namespace.description: Namespace to import the project into (user or group path)

overwrite.description: If true, overwrite an existing project with the same path

path.description: URL path for the imported project

name: gitlab_instance_variable_create
description:
Create a new CI/CD variable at the GitLab instance level. Requires key and value. Optionally set type (env_var/file), protection, and masking.

Returns: JSON with the created variable details. See also: gitlab_instance_variable_list.

masked.description: Mask variable value in job logs

raw.description: Treat variable value as raw string

name: gitlab_instance_variable_delete
description:
Delete a CI/CD variable from the GitLab instance level by key. This action cannot be undone.

Returns: JSON confirmation of deletion. See also: gitlab_instance_variable_list.

name: gitlab_instance_variable_get
description:
Get a specific CI/CD variable by key from the GitLab instance level.

Returns: JSON with variable details (key, value, type, protection, masking). See also: gitlab_instance_variable_list.

name: gitlab_instance_variable_list
description:
List CI/CD variables at the GitLab instance level. Returns paginated results with variable key, type, protection, and masking.

Returns: JSON with array of instance-level CI/CD variables and pagination info. See also: gitlab_instance_variable_get.

name: gitlab_instance_variable_update
description:
Update an existing CI/CD variable at the GitLab instance level. Specify the key to update and any fields to change.

Returns: JSON with the updated variable details. See also: gitlab_instance_variable_get.

masked.description: Mask variable value in job logs

raw.description: Treat variable value as raw string

name: gitlab_interactive_issue_create
description:
Interactively create a GitLab issue with step-by-step user prompts via MCP elicitation. Guides the user through entering title, description, labels, and confidentiality settings with confirmation before creation. Requires the MCP client to support the elicitation capability.

Returns: JSON with the created issue details.

See also: gitlab_issue_create

project_id.description: Project ID or URL-encoded path where the issue will be created

name: gitlab_interactive_mr_create
description:
Interactively create a GitLab merge request with step-by-step user prompts via MCP elicitation. Guides the user through entering branches, title, description, labels, squash/remove-source options with confirmation. Requires the MCP client to support the elicitation capability.

Returns: JSON with the created merge request details.

See also: gitlab_mr_create

project_id.description: Project ID or URL-encoded path where the MR will be created

name: gitlab_interactive_project_create
description:
Interactively create a GitLab project with step-by-step user prompts via MCP elicitation. Guides the user through entering name, description, visibility, README initialization, and default branch with confirmation. Requires the MCP client to support the elicitation capability.

Returns: JSON with the created project details.

See also: gitlab_project_create

project_id.description: Optional: pre-fill project ID or path for tools that need it

name: gitlab_interactive_release_create
description:
Interactively create a GitLab release with step-by-step user prompts via MCP elicitation. Guides the user through entering tag name, release name, description with confirmation before creation. Requires the MCP client to support the elicitation capability.

Returns: JSON with the created release details.

See also: gitlab_release_create

project_id.description: Project ID or URL-encoded path where the release will be created

name: gitlab_issue_create
description: Create a new issue in a GitLab project. Supports title, description (Markdown), assignees, labels, milestone, due date, confidential flag, issue_type (issue/incident/test_case/task), weight, and epic_id. Returns the created issue with ID, IID, state, and web URL. See also: gitlab_issue_list, gitlab_issue_note_create.

assignee_id.description: Single user ID to assign (use assignee_ids for multiple)

created_at.description: Creation date override (ISO 8601, requires admin permissions)

discussion_to_resolve.description: Discussion ID to mark as resolved by this issue

epic_id.description: Epic ID to associate the issue with

merge_request_to_resolve_discussions_of.description: MR IID whose unresolved discussions become issues

name: gitlab_issue_create_todo
description:
Create a to-do item for the authenticated user on the specified issue. The to-do will appear in the user's GitLab to-do list.

Returns: JSON with the created to-do item.

See also: gitlab_issue_get, gitlab_todo_list.

name: gitlab_issue_delete
description:
Permanently delete a GitLab issue. This action cannot be undone. Requires at least Maintainer access level.

Returns: confirmation message. See also: gitlab_issue_list.

name: gitlab_issue_emoji_create
description:
Add an award emoji reaction to a project issue.

See also: gitlab_issue_emoji_list, gitlab_issue_emoji_delete

Returns: JSON with the created award emoji.

iid.description: Issue IID or MR IID or Snippet ID,required

name: gitlab_issue_emoji_delete
description:
Delete an award emoji from a project issue.

See also: gitlab_issue_emoji_list, gitlab_issue_emoji_create

Returns: confirmation message.

iid.description: Issue IID or MR IID or Snippet ID,required

name: gitlab_issue_emoji_get
description:
Get a single award emoji on a project issue.

See also: gitlab_issue_emoji_list, gitlab_issue_emoji_create

Returns: JSON with award emoji details including id, name, user, and created_at.

iid.description: Issue IID or MR IID or Snippet ID,required

name: gitlab_issue_emoji_list
description:
List all award emoji on a project issue.

See also: gitlab_issue_emoji_create, gitlab_mr_emoji_list

Returns: JSON array of award emoji with pagination. Fields include id, name, user, and awardable_type.

iid.description: Issue IID or MR IID or Snippet ID,required

per_page.description: Number of items per page (default 20, max 100)

name: gitlab_issue_get
description: Retrieve a single GitLab issue by its project-scoped IID (the '#N' number shown in URLs and UI, NOT the global numeric ID). For global IDs, use gitlab_issue_get_by_id instead. Returns title, description, state, labels, assignees, milestone, author, timestamps, and web URL. See also: gitlab_issue_note_list, gitlab_issue_mrs_closing.

name: gitlab_issue_get_by_id
description:
Retrieve a single GitLab issue by its global numeric ID (the 'id' field, NOT the '#N' IID shown in URLs). Use this only when you have a global ID from another API response. For the common case of looking up issue #N in a project, use gitlab_issue_get with the IID instead.

Returns: JSON with issue details. See also: gitlab_issue_get.

issue_id.description: The global issue ID (not the project-scoped IID),required

name: gitlab_issue_iteration_event_get
description:
Get a single iteration event for a project issue.

Returns: JSON with iteration event details including id, action, user, iteration, created_at.

See also: gitlab_issue_iteration_event_list, gitlab_issue_milestone_event_get

name: gitlab_issue_iteration_event_list
description:
List iteration events for a project issue. Shows when iterations were added or removed.

Returns: JSON array of iteration events with pagination. Fields include id, action, user, iteration, created_at.

See also: gitlab_issue_iteration_event_get, gitlab_issue_label_event_list

name: gitlab_issue_label_event_get
description:
Get a single label event for a project issue.

Returns: JSON with label event details including id, action, user, created_at.

See also: gitlab_issue_label_event_list, gitlab_issue_milestone_event_get

name: gitlab_issue_label_event_list
description:
List label events for a project issue. Shows when labels were added or removed.

Returns: JSON array of label events with pagination. Fields include id, action, user, created_at.

See also: gitlab_issue_label_event_get, gitlab_list_issues

name: gitlab_issue_link_create
description:
Create a link between two issues. Specify source project/issue and target project/issue. Link types: relates_to (default), blocks, is_blocked_by.

Returns: JSON with the created issue link details.

See also: gitlab_issue_link_list, gitlab_issue_link_delete

link_type.description: Link type: relates_to (default), blocks, or is_blocked_by

project_id.description: Source project ID or URL-encoded path,required

name: gitlab_issue_link_delete
description:
Delete an issue link, removing the two-way relationship between the linked issues. This action cannot be undone.

Returns: confirmation message.

See also: gitlab_issue_link_list, gitlab_issue_link_create

name: gitlab_issue_link_get
description:
Get a specific issue link by ID, returning source and target issue details with link type.

Returns: JSON with the issue link details.

See also: gitlab_issue_link_list, gitlab_issue_link_delete

name: gitlab_issue_link_list
description:
List issue relations (linked issues) for a given issue in a GitLab project. Returns related issues with link type (relates_to, blocks, is_blocked_by).

Returns: JSON array of linked issues.

See also: gitlab_issue_link_create, gitlab_get_issue

name: gitlab_issue_list
description: List issues for a GitLab project with filters for state, labels, milestone, assignee, author, and search. Returns paginated results with issue details. See also: gitlab_issue_get, gitlab_issue_create.

created_after.description: Return issues created after date (ISO 8601 format, e.g. 2025-01-01T00:00:00Z)

created_before.description: Return issues created before date (ISO 8601 format, e.g. 2025-12-31T23:59:59Z)

issue_type.description: Filter by issue type (issue, incident, test_case, task)

labels.description: Comma-separated label names to filter by

order_by.description: Order by field (created_at, updated_at, priority, due_date)

updated_after.description: Return issues updated after date (ISO 8601 format, e.g. 2025-01-01T00:00:00Z)

updated_before.description: Return issues updated before date (ISO 8601 format, e.g. 2025-12-31T23:59:59Z)

name: gitlab_issue_list_all
description: List issues visible to the authenticated user across all projects (global scope). Supports filtering by state, labels, milestone, scope, search, assignee, author, time range, confidential flag, and ordering. Returns paginated results. See also: gitlab_issue_list, gitlab_issue_get.

labels.description: Comma-separated label names to filter by

order_by.description: Order by field (created_at, updated_at, priority, due_date)

name: gitlab_issue_list_group
description: List issues across all projects in a GitLab group. Supports filtering by state, labels, milestone, scope, time range, assignee, author, and search. Returns paginated issue details including project reference. See also: gitlab_issue_list, gitlab_issue_get.

labels.description: Comma-separated list of labels to filter by

name: gitlab_issue_milestone_event_get
description:
Get a single milestone event for a project issue.

Returns: JSON with milestone event details including id, action, user, created_at.

See also: gitlab_issue_milestone_event_list, gitlab_issue_state_event_get

name: gitlab_issue_milestone_event_list
description:
List milestone events for a project issue. Shows when milestones were added or removed.

Returns: JSON array of milestone events with pagination. Fields include id, action, user, created_at.

See also: gitlab_issue_milestone_event_get, gitlab_issue_label_event_list

name: gitlab_issue_move
description:
Move an issue from one project to another. Requires at least Reporter access on both the source and target projects.

Returns: JSON with the moved issue details. See also: gitlab_issue_get, gitlab_project_list.

project_id.description: Source project ID or URL-encoded path,required

to_project_id.description: Target project ID to move issue to,required

name: gitlab_issue_mrs_closing
description: List merge requests that will close this issue when merged. Returns MR details including source/target branches. See also: gitlab_mr_get, gitlab_issue_mrs_related.

name: gitlab_issue_mrs_related
description: List merge requests related to this issue. Returns MR details including source/target branches. See also: gitlab_issue_get, gitlab_mr_list.

name: gitlab_issue_note_create
description:
Add a comment (note) to a GitLab issue. Supports Markdown formatting and optional internal visibility flag (visible only to project members).

Returns: JSON with created note including ID, body, author, and timestamps. See also: gitlab_issue_get.

internal.description: Mark note as internal (visible only to project members)

name: gitlab_issue_note_delete
description:
Permanently delete a comment from a GitLab issue. Only the note author or a project maintainer can delete a note.

Returns: JSON with deletion confirmation. See also: gitlab_issue_note_get.

note_id.description: ID of the note to delete,required

name: gitlab_issue_note_emoji_create
description:
Add an award emoji reaction to a project issue note.

See also: gitlab_issue_note_emoji_list, gitlab_issue_note_emoji_delete

Returns: JSON with the created award emoji.

iid.description: Issue IID or MR IID or Snippet ID,required

name: gitlab_issue_note_emoji_delete
description:
Delete an award emoji from a project issue note.

See also: gitlab_issue_note_emoji_list, gitlab_issue_note_emoji_create

Returns: confirmation message.

iid.description: Issue IID or MR IID or Snippet ID,required

name: gitlab_issue_note_emoji_get
description:
Get a single award emoji on a project issue note.

See also: gitlab_issue_note_emoji_list, gitlab_issue_note_emoji_create

Returns: JSON with award emoji details including id, name, user, and created_at.

iid.description: Issue IID or MR IID or Snippet ID,required

name: gitlab_issue_note_emoji_list
description:
List all award emoji on a project issue note.

See also: gitlab_issue_note_emoji_create, gitlab_issue_emoji_list

Returns: JSON array of award emoji with pagination. Fields include id, name, user, and awardable_type.

iid.description: Issue IID or MR IID or Snippet ID,required

per_page.description: Number of items per page (default 20, max 100)

name: gitlab_issue_note_get
description:
Get a single comment (note) from a GitLab issue by its note ID, including author, timestamps, body, and internal/system flags.

Returns: JSON with note details including ID, body, author, and timestamps. See also: gitlab_issue_note_list.

note_id.description: ID of the note to retrieve,required

name: gitlab_issue_note_list
description:
List all comments (notes) on a GitLab issue. Supports ordering by created_at or updated_at, sort direction, and pagination.

Returns: JSON with notes array including body, author, timestamps, and system/internal flags. See also: gitlab_issue_get, gitlab_list_issue_discussions.

order_by.description: Order by field (created_at, updated_at)

name: gitlab_issue_note_update
description:
Edit the body text of an existing comment on a GitLab issue. Only the note author or a project maintainer can update a note.

Returns: JSON with updated note including ID, body, author, and timestamps. See also: gitlab_issue_note_get.

note_id.description: ID of the note to update,required

name: gitlab_issue_participants
description: List all participants (users who engaged) in an issue. Returns usernames, names, and profile URLs. See also: gitlab_issue_get, gitlab_member_list.

name: gitlab_issue_reorder
description:
Reorder an issue by specifying the issue to position it before or after. Use move_after_id and/or move_before_id to set the relative position.

Returns: JSON with the reordered issue details. See also: gitlab_issue_list.

move_after_id.description: ID of issue to position after

move_before_id.description: ID of issue to position before

name: gitlab_issue_spent_time_add
description:
Add spent time to an issue using a human-readable duration (e.g. 1h, 30m) with an optional summary.

Returns: JSON with updated time tracking statistics. See also: gitlab_issue_get.

name: gitlab_issue_spent_time_reset
description:
Reset the total spent time for an issue to zero.

Returns: JSON with reset time tracking statistics. See also: gitlab_issue_get.

name: gitlab_issue_state_event_get
description:
Get a single state event for a project issue.

Returns: JSON with state event details including id, state, user, created_at.

See also: gitlab_issue_state_event_list, gitlab_issue_milestone_event_get

name: gitlab_issue_state_event_list
description:
List state events for a project issue. Shows when the issue was opened, closed, or reopened.

Returns: JSON array of state events with pagination. Fields include id, state, user, created_at.

See also: gitlab_issue_state_event_get, gitlab_issue_label_event_list

name: gitlab_issue_subscribe
description:
Subscribe the authenticated user to an issue to receive notifications on updates.

Returns: JSON with the issue details. See also: gitlab_issue_get.

name: gitlab_issue_time_estimate_reset
description:
Reset the time estimate for an issue back to zero.

Returns: JSON with reset time tracking statistics. See also: gitlab_issue_get.

name: gitlab_issue_time_estimate_set
description:
Set the time estimate for an issue using a human-readable duration (e.g. 3h30m, 1w2d).

Returns: JSON with updated time tracking statistics. See also: gitlab_issue_get.

name: gitlab_issue_time_stats_get
description:
Get time tracking statistics for an issue (estimate and spent time).

Returns: JSON with time tracking statistics including estimate and spent time. See also: gitlab_issue_get.

name: gitlab_issue_unsubscribe
description:
Unsubscribe the authenticated user from an issue to stop receiving notifications.

Returns: JSON with the issue details. See also: gitlab_issue_get.

name: gitlab_issue_update
description:
Update a GitLab issue. Supports changing title, description, state (close/reopen), assignees, labels (replace, add, or remove), milestone, due date, confidential flag, issue_type, weight, and discussion_locked. Only specified fields are modified.

Returns: JSON with the updated issue details. See also: gitlab_issue_get, gitlab_issue_note_create.

add_labels.description: Comma-separated labels to add without removing existing

assignee_id.description: Single user ID to assign (use assignee_ids for multiple)

due_date.description: New due date in YYYY-MM-DD format

labels.description: Comma-separated labels to replace all existing

name: gitlab_issue_weight_event_list
description:
List weight events for a project issue. Shows when weight was changed.

Returns: JSON array of weight events with pagination. Fields include id, weight, user, created_at.

See also: gitlab_issue_label_event_list, gitlab_issue_state_event_list

name: gitlab_job_artifacts
description:
Download the artifacts archive (zip) for a specific job. Returns base64-encoded content (limited to 1MB). Use for retrieving build outputs.

Returns: base64-encoded artifact archive content.

See also: gitlab_job_get.

name: gitlab_job_cancel
description:
Cancel a running or pending CI/CD job in a GitLab project. Returns the updated job details.

Returns: JSON with the updated job details. See also: gitlab_job_retry, gitlab_job_get.

name: gitlab_job_delete_artifacts
description:
Delete the artifacts for a specific job.

Returns: confirmation message.

See also: gitlab_job_artifacts.

job_id.description: Job ID to delete artifacts from,required

name: gitlab_job_delete_project_artifacts
description:
Delete all artifacts across an entire project. This is a destructive operation.

Returns: confirmation message.

See also: gitlab_job_list_project.

name: gitlab_job_download_artifacts
description:
Download the artifacts archive for a specific ref and optional job name. Returns base64-encoded content (limited to 1MB).

Returns: base64-encoded artifact archive content. See also: gitlab_job_get.

job.description: Job name to download artifacts from

name: gitlab_job_download_single_artifact
description:
Download a single artifact file from a job by its path within the archive. Returns raw file content. Useful for reading specific build outputs like test results or coverage reports.

Returns: raw artifact file content. See also: gitlab_job_download_artifacts.

artifact_path.description: Path to the artifact file within the archive

name: gitlab_job_download_single_artifact_by_ref
description:
Download a single artifact file by branch/tag name and artifact path. Returns raw file content from the latest successful pipeline for that ref.

Returns: raw artifact file content.

See also: gitlab_job_artifacts.

artifact_path.description: Path to the artifact file within the archive

name: gitlab_job_erase
description:
Erase a job's trace log and artifacts. Returns the updated job details with erased_at timestamp.

Returns: JSON with the updated job details. See also: gitlab_job_get.

name: gitlab_job_get
description:
Retrieve detailed information about a specific CI/CD job in a GitLab project. Returns job ID, name, status, stage, pipeline, runner, duration, coverage, timestamps, and web URL.

Returns: JSON with job details. See also: gitlab_job_cancel, gitlab_job_trace.

name: gitlab_job_keep_artifacts
description:
Prevent a job's artifacts from being deleted when expiration is set. Returns updated job details.

Returns: JSON with the updated job details.

See also: gitlab_job_artifacts.

name: gitlab_job_list
description:
List jobs for a specific pipeline in a GitLab project. Supports filtering by scope (created, pending, running, failed, success, canceled, skipped, manual). Returns job ID, name, status, stage, runner, duration, and web URL with pagination.

Returns: JSON array of jobs with pagination. See also: gitlab_job_get, gitlab_pipeline_get.

include_retried.description: Include retried jobs in the response

pipeline_id.description: Pipeline ID to list jobs for,required

scope.description: Filter by job status: created, pending, running, failed, success, canceled, skipped, waiting_for_resource, manual

name: gitlab_job_list_bridges
description:
List pipeline bridge (trigger) jobs for a pipeline. Bridge jobs connect upstream and downstream pipelines. Returns bridge ID, name, stage, status, duration, and downstream pipeline ID.

Returns: JSON array of bridge jobs with pagination. See also: gitlab_job_list, gitlab_pipeline_get.

pipeline_id.description: Pipeline ID to list bridge jobs for,required

scope.description: Filter by job status: created, pending, running, failed, success, canceled, skipped, manual

name: gitlab_job_list_project
description:
List all jobs across a GitLab project (not limited to a single pipeline). Supports filtering by scope and pagination. Returns job ID, name, status, stage, duration.

Returns: JSON array of jobs with pagination.

See also: gitlab_job_get.

include_retried.description: Include retried jobs in the response

scope.description: Filter by job status: created, pending, running, failed, success, canceled, skipped, waiting_for_resource, manual

name: gitlab_job_play
description:
Trigger (play) a manual CI/CD job. Supports passing job variables. Returns updated job details.

Returns: JSON with the updated job details. See also: gitlab_job_get.

variable_type.description: Variable type (env_var or file, default: env_var)

name: gitlab_job_retry
description:
Retry a failed or canceled CI/CD job in a GitLab project. Returns the new job details.

Returns: JSON with the updated job details. See also: gitlab_job_get, gitlab_pipeline_get.

name: gitlab_job_trace
description:
Retrieve the log (trace) output of a CI/CD job. Returns the raw log text, truncated to the last 100KB if larger. There is no pagination — if the log is truncated, the beginning is lost. Useful for debugging failed jobs by examining the most recent output.

Returns: job trace log content. See also: gitlab_job_get.

job_id.description: Job ID to get trace log for,required

name: gitlab_job_wait
description:
Wait for a CI/CD job to reach a terminal state (success, failed, canceled, skipped, manual). Polls the job status at a configurable interval and sends progress notifications. Returns the final job details when done or when the timeout is reached.

Returns: job details, waited_for duration, poll_count, final_status, timed_out flag. See also: gitlab_job_get, gitlab_job_trace.

fail_on_error.description: Return isError when job ends in failed/canceled status (default true)

timeout_seconds.description: Maximum wait time in seconds (1-3600, default 300)

name: gitlab_label_create
description: Create a new label in a GitLab project with a name, color (hex), optional description, and optional priority. Returns: label ID, name, color, description, priority, and subscribed status. See also: gitlab_label_list, gitlab_issue_create.

priority.description: Label priority (lower is higher priority, 0 means no priority)

name: gitlab_label_delete
description:
Delete a project label by ID or name.

Returns: confirmation message. See also: gitlab_label_list.

name: gitlab_label_get
description: Get details of a single project label by ID or name. Returns: ID, name, color, description, priority, open/closed issue counts, open MR count, and subscribed status. See also: gitlab_label_update.

name: gitlab_label_list
description:
List all labels for a GitLab project. Supports filtering by search keyword, including issue/MR counts (with_counts), and including labels from ancestor groups. Returns label name, color, description, open/closed issue counts, and merge request counts with pagination.

Returns: paginated list of labels with id, name, color, description, open/closed issue counts, and MR counts. See also: gitlab_label_get, gitlab_label_create.

with_counts.description: Include issue and merge request counts

name: gitlab_label_promote
description:
Promote a project label to a group label, making it available to all projects in the group.

Returns: confirmation message. See also: gitlab_label_get, gitlab_group_label_list.

name: gitlab_label_subscribe
description: Subscribe to a project label to receive notifications when the label is applied to issues or merge requests. Returns: label details with subscribed status set to true. See also: gitlab_label_get.

name: gitlab_label_unsubscribe
description:
Unsubscribe from a project label to stop receiving notifications.

Returns: confirmation message. See also: gitlab_label_get.

name: gitlab_label_update
description: Update an existing project label. Can change name, color, description, or priority. Only specified fields are modified. Returns: updated label with ID, name, color, description, and priority. See also: gitlab_label_get.

color.description: New label color in hex format

name: gitlab_list_alert_metric_images
description:
List metric images for a GitLab alert.

Returns: JSON array of metric images with pagination.

See also: gitlab_get_error_tracking_settings, gitlab_upload_alert_metric_image

name: gitlab_list_applications
description:
List all OAuth2 applications (admin). Params: page, per_page.

Returns: JSON array of OAuth2 applications with pagination.

See also: gitlab_create_application, gitlab_list_integrations

name: gitlab_list_attestations
description:
List all build attestations for a project matching a subject digest.

Returns: JSON with attestations array. See also: gitlab_download_attestation.

name: gitlab_list_branch_rules
description: List branch rules for a project via GraphQL API. Provides an aggregated read-only view of branch protections, approval rules, and external status checks. Returns: paginated list with name, protection status, force push, code owner approval, approval rules, and external status checks. See also: gitlab_branch_protect, gitlab_branch_list.

after.description: Cursor for forward pagination (from previous response end_cursor)

before.description: Cursor for backward pagination (from previous response start_cursor)

first.description: Number of items to return (default 20, max 100)

last.description: Number of items from the end (backward pagination)

name: gitlab_list_broadcast_messages
description:
List all broadcast messages. Requires admin access.

Returns: JSON with array of broadcast messages and pagination info.

See also: gitlab_create_broadcast_message, gitlab_get_appearance

name: gitlab_list_catalog_resources
description: List CI/CD Catalog resources. Search the catalog of reusable CI/CD components. Supports filtering by search text, scope (ALL or NAMESPACED), and sorting. Returns: paginated list with name, stars, forks, and latest version. See also: gitlab_get_catalog_resource, gitlab_template.

after.description: Cursor for forward pagination (from previous response end_cursor)

before.description: Cursor for backward pagination (from previous response start_cursor)

first.description: Number of items to return (default 20, max 100)

last.description: Number of items from the end (backward pagination)

search.description: Search resources by name or description

sort.description: Sort order: NAME_ASC (default), NAME_DESC, LATEST_RELEASED_AT_ASC, LATEST_RELEASED_AT_DESC, STAR_COUNT_ASC, STAR_COUNT_DESC

name: gitlab_list_ci_yml_templates
description:
List all available GitLab CI YAML templates. Returns key and name for each template.

Returns: JSON array of CI YAML templates with pagination.

See also: gitlab_get_ci_yml_template, gitlab_ci_lint

name: gitlab_list_cluster_agent_tokens
description:
List tokens for a cluster agent

See also: gitlab_create_cluster_agent_token, gitlab_get_cluster_agent

Returns: JSON array of agent tokens with pagination.

name: gitlab_list_cluster_agents
description:
List cluster agents for a GitLab project

See also: gitlab_register_cluster_agent, gitlab_list_cluster_agent_tokens

Returns: JSON array of cluster agents with pagination.

name: gitlab_list_commit_discussions
description:
List discussion threads on a project commit.

Returns: JSON with discussion threads including notes, authors, and positions.

See also: gitlab_create_commit_discussion, gitlab_get_commit

name: gitlab_list_custom_attributes
description:
List custom attributes for a user, group, or project (admin). Params: resource_type (required: user|group|project), resource_id (required).

Returns: JSON array of custom attributes.

See also: gitlab_get_custom_attribute, gitlab_set_custom_attribute

resource_type.description: Resource type: user, group, or project,required

name: gitlab_list_custom_emoji
description: List custom emoji for a GitLab group via GraphQL API. Returns: paginated list with ID, name, URL, and created date. See also: gitlab_create_custom_emoji.

after.description: Cursor for forward pagination (from previous response end_cursor)

before.description: Cursor for backward pagination (from previous response start_cursor)

first.description: Number of items to return (default 20, max 100)

last.description: Number of items from the end (backward pagination)

name: gitlab_list_deployment_merge_requests
description:
List merge requests associated with a specific deployment in a GitLab project.

Returns: JSON array of merge requests with pagination.

See also: gitlab_deployment_get, gitlab_mr_list.

order_by.description: Order by: created_at or updated_at

state.description: Filter by state: opened, closed, merged, all

name: gitlab_list_dockerfile_templates
description:
List all available Dockerfile templates.

Returns: JSON array of Dockerfile templates with pagination.

name: gitlab_list_emails
description:
List email addresses for the currently authenticated GitLab user. Returns email ID, address, and confirmation status.

name: gitlab_list_emails_for_user
description:
List email addresses for a specific GitLab user by user ID.

name: gitlab_list_enterprise_users
description:
List all enterprise users for a GitLab group.

Returns: JSON with users array and pagination. See also: gitlab_get_enterprise_user.

created_after.description: Filter users created after this date (ISO 8601)

created_before.description: Filter users created before this date (ISO 8601)

search.description: Search by name or username or email

two_factor.description: Filter by 2FA status: enabled or disabled

name: gitlab_list_epic_discussions
description:
List discussion threads on a group epic via the Work Items GraphQL API.

after.description: Cursor for forward pagination (from previous response end_cursor)

before.description: Cursor for backward pagination (from previous response start_cursor)

full_path.description: Full path of the group (e.g. my-group or my-group/sub-group),required

name: gitlab_list_error_tracking_client_keys
description:
List error tracking client keys for a GitLab project.

See also: gitlab_get_error_tracking_settings, gitlab_create_error_tracking_client_key

name: gitlab_list_feature_definitions
description:
List all feature definitions (admin). Returns name, type, group, milestone and default_enabled for each definition.

name: gitlab_list_features
description:
List all feature flags (admin). Returns name, state and gates for each flag.

Returns: JSON array of feature flags.

name: gitlab_list_freeze_periods
description:
List deploy freeze periods for a GitLab project.

name: gitlab_list_geo_sites
description:
List all Geo replication sites.

name: gitlab_list_gitignore_templates
description:
List all available gitignore templates.

name: gitlab_list_gpg_keys
description:
List GPG keys for the currently authenticated GitLab user.

description:
List GPG keys for a specific GitLab user by user ID.

description:
List all badges of a group.

description:
List iterations for a group. Iterations provide time-boxed planning periods.

Returns: JSON array of iterations with pagination. Fields include id, iid, title, state, start_date, due_date, web_url.

See also: gitlab_list_project_iterations

state.description: Filter by state: opened, upcoming, current, closed, all

name: gitlab_list_group_markdown_uploads
description:
List markdown uploads for a group.

Returns: JSON array of uploads with pagination.

See also: gitlab_delete_group_markdown_upload_by_id, gitlab_upload_project_file

group_id.description: The ID or URL-encoded path of the group,required

name: gitlab_list_group_member_roles
description:
List all custom member roles for a GitLab group.

Returns: JSON with roles array. See also: gitlab_create_group_member_role.

name: gitlab_list_group_personal_access_tokens
description:
List personal access tokens managed by a GitLab group. Supports filtering by name, state, and revoked status.

Returns: JSON with tokens array. See also: gitlab_revoke_group_personal_access_token.

name: gitlab_list_group_relations_export_status
description:
List the status of group relations exports.

Returns: JSON array of export statuses.

See also: gitlab_schedule_group_relations_export, gitlab_schedule_group_export

group_id.description: The ID or URL-encoded path of the group,required

name: gitlab_list_group_scim_identities
description:
List all SCIM identities for a GitLab group. Returns external UIDs, user IDs, and active status.

Returns: JSON with identities array. See also: gitlab_get_group_scim_identity.

name: gitlab_list_group_ssh_certificates
description:
List all SSH certificates for a GitLab group.

Returns: JSON with certificates array. See also: gitlab_create_group_ssh_certificate.

name: gitlab_list_group_ssh_keys
description:
List SSH keys managed by a GitLab group.

Returns: JSON with keys array. See also: gitlab_delete_group_ssh_key.

name: gitlab_list_impersonation_tokens
description:
List all impersonation tokens for a GitLab user by user ID. Optionally filter by state (all/active/inactive).

See also: gitlab_get_impersonation_token, gitlab_create_impersonation_token

Returns: JSON array of impersonation tokens.

name: gitlab_list_instance_audit_events
description: List instance-level audit events (admin only). Supports filtering by date range. Returns: paginated list of audit events with ID, author, entity, event details. See also: gitlab_get_instance_audit_event, gitlab_list_group_audit_events, gitlab_list_project_audit_events.

created_after.description: Return events created after this date (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD)

created_before.description: Return events created before this date (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD)

name: gitlab_list_instance_member_roles
description:
List all custom member roles at the GitLab instance level. Requires admin access.

Returns: JSON with roles array. See also: gitlab_create_instance_member_role.

name: gitlab_list_integrations
description:
List all integrations (services) configured for a project, including their active status.

Returns: JSON array of integrations with status.

See also: gitlab_get_integration, gitlab_set_jira_integration

name: gitlab_list_issue_discussions
description:
List discussion threads on a project issue.

Returns: JSON array of discussions with pagination. See also: gitlab_issue_get, gitlab_issue_note_list.

name: gitlab_list_job_token_group_allowlist
description:
List groups on the CI/CD job token allowlist for a GitLab project.

Returns: JSON array of allowlist entries with pagination.

See also: gitlab_add_group_job_token_allowlist, gitlab_get_job_token_access_settings

name: gitlab_list_job_token_inbound_allowlist
description:
List projects on the CI/CD job token inbound allowlist for a GitLab project.

Returns: JSON array of allowlist entries with pagination.

See also: gitlab_add_project_job_token_allowlist, gitlab_get_job_token_access_settings

name: gitlab_list_license_templates
description:
List all available open-source license templates. Optionally filter by popular.

Returns: JSON array of license templates with pagination.

See also: gitlab_get_license_template, gitlab_list_gitignore_templates

name: gitlab_list_merge_request_in_merge_train
description:
List merge requests in a merge train for a specific target branch.

Returns: JSON array of merge train entries with pagination.

See also: gitlab_list_project_merge_trains, gitlab_add_merge_request_to_merge_train

name: gitlab_list_mr_context_commits
description:
List context commits associated with a merge request. Context commits are additional commits relevant to the MR but not in the diff. Returns commit SHA, title, and author for each.

Returns: JSON array of context commits.

See also: gitlab_mr_commits, gitlab_create_mr_context_commits

name: gitlab_list_package_protection_rules
description:
List all package protection rules for a GitLab project. Protection rules restrict who can push or delete matching packages.

Returns: JSON with rules array including name pattern, package type, and minimum access levels. See also: gitlab_create_package_protection_rule.

name: gitlab_list_project_aliases
description:
List all project aliases (admin-only). Project aliases allow accessing projects via alternative names.

Returns: JSON with aliases array.

See also: gitlab_get_project_alias, gitlab_create_project_alias

name: gitlab_list_project_audit_events
description: List audit events for a GitLab project. Supports filtering by date range. Returns: paginated list of audit events with ID, author, entity, event details. See also: gitlab_get_project_audit_event, gitlab_list_group_audit_events, gitlab_list_instance_audit_events.

created_after.description: Return events created after this date (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD)

created_before.description: Return events created before this date (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD)

name: gitlab_list_project_badges
description:
List all badges of a project, including inherited group badges.

See also: gitlab_add_project_badge, gitlab_list_group_badges

Returns: JSON array of badges with pagination.

name: gitlab_list_project_dependencies
description: List dependencies for a GitLab project. Supports filtering by package manager. Returns: paginated list with name, version, package manager, file path, vulnerabilities, and licenses. See also: gitlab_create_dependency_list_export, gitlab_list_vulnerabilities.

package_manager.description: Filter by package manager (bundler, composer, conan, go, gradle, maven, npm, nuget, pip, pipenv, pnpm, yarn, sbt, setuptools)

name: gitlab_list_project_external_status_checks
description:
List external status checks configured for a project. Returns: paginated list with ID, name, external URL, HMAC, protected branches count.

See also: gitlab_create_project_external_status_check, gitlab_update_project_external_status_check.

name: gitlab_list_project_iterations
description:
List iterations for a project. Iterations provide time-boxed planning periods.

Returns: JSON array of iterations with pagination. Fields include id, iid, title, state, start_date, due_date, web_url.

See also: gitlab_list_group_iterations

state.description: Filter by state: opened, upcoming, current, closed, all

name: gitlab_list_project_merge_trains
description:
List all merge trains for a project.

Returns: JSON array of merge train entries with pagination. Fields include id, merge_request, user, pipeline, target_branch, status, duration.

See also: gitlab_list_merge_request_in_merge_train, gitlab_get_merge_request_on_merge_train

name: gitlab_list_project_mirrors
description:
List all remote push mirrors configured for a GitLab project. Returns mirror URL, status, enabled state, and configuration.

Returns: JSON with mirrors array and pagination. See also: gitlab_get_project_mirror.

name: gitlab_list_project_mr_external_status_checks
description:
List external status checks for a project merge request. Returns: paginated list with ID, name, external URL, status.

See also: gitlab_set_project_mr_external_status_check_status, gitlab_retry_failed_external_status_check_for_project_mr.

name: gitlab_list_project_status_checks
description:
List project-level external status checks. Returns: paginated list with ID, name, external URL, HMAC, protected branches.

See also: gitlab_list_project_external_status_checks, gitlab_create_project_external_status_check.

name: gitlab_list_project_templates
description:
List project templates of a given type (dockerfiles, gitignores, gitlab_ci_ymls, licenses).

Returns: JSON array of templates with pagination.

See also: gitlab_get_project_template, gitlab_list_ci_yml_templates

template_type.description: Template type: dockerfiles, gitignores, gitlab_ci_ymls, licenses,required

name: gitlab_list_repository_submodules
description:
List all Git submodules defined in a repository. Parses .gitmodules and enriches each entry with the current commit SHA pointer and resolved project path.

Returns: JSON array of submodules with commit SHAs.

See also: gitlab_read_repository_submodule_file, gitlab_update_repository_submodule

ref.description: Branch name, tag, or commit SHA (defaults to default branch)

name: gitlab_list_resource_group_upcoming_jobs
description:
List upcoming jobs for a resource group.

Returns: JSON array of upcoming jobs with pagination.

See also: gitlab_get_resource_group, gitlab_list_resource_groups

name: gitlab_list_resource_groups
description:
List resource groups for a GitLab project.

Returns: JSON array of resource groups with pagination.

See also: gitlab_get_resource_group, gitlab_list_pipelines

name: gitlab_list_secure_files
description:
List CI/CD secure files for a GitLab project.

Returns: JSON array of secure files with pagination.

See also: gitlab_show_secure_file, gitlab_list_ci_variables

name: gitlab_list_security_findings
description: List security report findings for a pipeline (requires Ultimate/Premium). Replaces deprecated REST vulnerability_findings endpoint. Supports filtering by severity, confidence, scanner, and report type. Returns: paginated list with finding details, scanner info, and linked vulnerabilities. See also: gitlab_list_vulnerabilities, gitlab_pipeline_security_summary.

after.description: Cursor for forward pagination (from previous response end_cursor)

before.description: Cursor for backward pagination (from previous response start_cursor)

confidence.description: Filter by confidence: CONFIRMED, MEDIUM, LOW

first.description: Number of items to return (default 20, max 100)

last.description: Number of items from the end (backward pagination)

project_path.description: Full path of the project (e.g. my-group/my-project),required

report_type.description: Filter by report type: SAST, DAST, DEPENDENCY_SCANNING, CONTAINER_SCANNING, SECRET_DETECTION, COVERAGE_FUZZING, API_FUZZING, CLUSTER_IMAGE_SCANNING

severity.description: Filter by severity: CRITICAL, HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW, INFO, UNKNOWN

name: gitlab_list_service_accounts
description:
List all GitLab service accounts with optional ordering and pagination.

See also: gitlab_create_service_account

Returns: JSON array of service accounts.

order_by.description: Field to order by (id/username/name)

name: gitlab_list_snippet_discussions
description:
List discussion threads on a project snippet.

Returns: JSON array of discussions with pagination.

See also: gitlab_get_snippet_discussion, gitlab_list_project_snippets

name: gitlab_list_ssh_keys
description:
List SSH keys for the currently authenticated GitLab user. Returns key ID, title, key content, usage type, and creation/expiration dates.

See also: gitlab_user_current, gitlab_deploy_key_list_project

Returns: JSON array of SSH keys with pagination.

name: gitlab_list_ssh_keys_for_user
description:
List SSH keys for a specific GitLab user by user ID. Returns key ID, title, content, usage type, and dates.

See also: gitlab_list_ssh_keys, gitlab_get_ssh_key_for_user

Returns: JSON array of SSH keys with pagination.

name: gitlab_list_status_all_geo_sites
description:
Retrieve replication status of all Geo sites.

Returns: JSON with array of Geo site statuses and pagination.

See also: gitlab_get_status_geo_site, gitlab_list_geo_sites

name: gitlab_list_system_hooks
description:
List all system hooks (admin). Returns ID, URL and event subscriptions.

Returns: JSON with array of system hooks and pagination info.

See also: gitlab_add_system_hook, gitlab_list_integrations

name: gitlab_list_terraform_states
description:
List Terraform states for a GitLab project

Returns: JSON array of Terraform states with pagination.

See also: gitlab_get_terraform_state, gitlab_list_secure_files

name: gitlab_list_topics
description:
List project topics. Can be filtered by search query.

See also: gitlab_create_topic, gitlab_list_projects

Returns: JSON with array of topics and pagination info.

name: gitlab_list_user_contribution_events
description:
List contribution events for a specific GitLab user. Returns events with action type, target information, and timestamps. Supports filtering by action, target type, date range, and pagination.

See also: gitlab_get_user, gitlab_list_user_contribution_events

Returns: JSON array of contribution events with pagination.

action.description: Filter by action type: created | updated | closed | reopened | pushed | commented | merged | joined | left | destroyed | expired | approved

target_type.description: Filter by target type: Issue | Milestone | MergeRequest | Note | Project | Snippet | User

user_id.description: The ID of the user whose events to retrieve,required

name: gitlab_list_users
description:
List GitLab users with optional filters. Supports search by name/username/email, filtering by active/blocked/external status, ordering, and pagination. Useful for finding users or auditing accounts.

See also: gitlab_get_user, gitlab_user_current

Returns: JSON array of users with pagination.

order_by.description: Order by: id | name | username | created_at | updated_at

search.description: Search users by name or username or email

name: gitlab_list_vulnerabilities
description: List project vulnerabilities (requires Ultimate/Premium). Supports filtering by severity, state, scanner, report type. Returns: paginated list with severity, state, scanner, and detected date. See also: gitlab_get_vulnerability, gitlab_vulnerability_severity_count, gitlab_list_security_findings.

after.description: Cursor for forward pagination (from previous response end_cursor)

before.description: Cursor for backward pagination (from previous response start_cursor)

first.description: Number of items to return (default 20, max 100)

has_issues.description: Filter by whether a linked issue exists

has_resolution.description: Filter by whether a resolution exists

last.description: Number of items from the end (backward pagination)

project_path.description: Full path of the project (e.g. my-group/my-project),required

report_type.description: Filter by report type: SAST, DAST, DEPENDENCY_SCANNING, CONTAINER_SCANNING, SECRET_DETECTION, COVERAGE_FUZZING, API_FUZZING, CLUSTER_IMAGE_SCANNING

severity.description: Filter by severity: CRITICAL, HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW, INFO, UNKNOWN

sort.description: Sort order: severity_desc, severity_asc, detected_desc, detected_asc

state.description: Filter by state: DETECTED, CONFIRMED, DISMISSED, RESOLVED

name: gitlab_list_work_items
description:
List work items for a project or group. Supports filtering by state, type, labels, author, search. Experimental: the Work Items API may introduce breaking changes between minor versions.

Returns: JSON with array of work items and pagination info.

See also: gitlab_get_work_item, gitlab_create_work_item

first.description: Number of items to return (cursor-based pagination)

full_path.description: Full path of the project or group,required

name: gitlab_lock_terraform_state
description:
Lock a Terraform state

Returns: JSON confirming the state was locked.

See also: gitlab_unlock_terraform_state, gitlab_get_terraform_state

name: gitlab_mark_migration
description:
Mark a pending database migration as successfully executed (admin). Params: version (required), database (optional).

Returns: JSON with the migration mark confirmation.

See also: gitlab_server_status.

database.description: Database name (optional, e.g. main or ci)

version.description: Migration version number to mark as successful,required

name: gitlab_milestone_create
description: Create a new milestone in a GitLab project. Requires title; optionally set description, start_date (YYYY-MM-DD), and due_date (YYYY-MM-DD). Returns: milestone IID, title, state, start/due dates, web URL, and expiration status. See also: gitlab_milestone_get.

name: gitlab_milestone_delete
description:
Delete a project milestone by IID. This action is irreversible.

Returns: confirmation message. See also: gitlab_milestone_list.

milestone_iid.description: Milestone IID (project-scoped). Use gitlab_milestone_list to find IIDs,required

name: gitlab_milestone_get
description:
Get details of a single project milestone by IID. Returns milestone title, description, state, start/due dates, web URL, and expiration status.

Returns: JSON with milestone details. See also: gitlab_milestone_update, gitlab_milestone_issues.

milestone_iid.description: Milestone IID (project-scoped). Use gitlab_milestone_list to find IIDs,required

name: gitlab_milestone_issues
description:
List all issues assigned to a project milestone by IID. Returns issue IID, title, state, web URL, and creation date with pagination.

Returns: JSON array of issues with pagination. See also: gitlab_milestone_get, gitlab_issue_list.

milestone_iid.description: Milestone IID (project-scoped). Use gitlab_milestone_list to find IIDs,required

name: gitlab_milestone_list
description:
List milestones for a GitLab project. Supports filtering by state (active, closed), exact title, search keyword, and including milestones from ancestor groups. Returns milestone title, description, state, start/due dates, web URL, and expiration status with pagination.

Returns: JSON array of milestones with pagination. See also: gitlab_milestone_get, gitlab_milestone_create.

search.description: Search milestones by title or description

name: gitlab_milestone_merge_requests
description:
List all merge requests assigned to a project milestone by IID. Returns MR IID, title, state, source/target branches, web URL, and creation date with pagination.

Returns: JSON array of merge requests with pagination. See also: gitlab_milestone_get, gitlab_mr_list.

milestone_iid.description: Milestone IID (project-scoped). Use gitlab_milestone_list to find IIDs,required

name: gitlab_milestone_update
description: Update an existing project milestone by IID. Supports changing title, description, start_date, due_date, and state_event (activate/close). Returns: updated milestone with IID, title, state, dates, web URL, and expired flag. See also: gitlab_milestone_get.

milestone_iid.description: Milestone IID (project-scoped). Use gitlab_milestone_list to find IIDs,required

name: gitlab_modify_user
description:
Modify an existing GitLab user account (admin only). Supports updating email, name, username, password, admin status, profile details, and permissions.

See also: gitlab_create_user, gitlab_get_user

Returns: JSON with updated user profile.

locked.description: Lock or unlock the user account

user_id.description: The ID of the user to modify,required

name: gitlab_mr_add_spent_time
description:
Add spent time to a GitLab merge request. Duration uses human-readable format (e.g. '1h', '30m', '1w2d'). Optional summary describes the work done. Returns updated time stats.

Returns: JSON with time stats including time_estimate, total_time_spent, and human-readable formats. See also: gitlab_mr_time_stats.

name: gitlab_mr_approval_config
description:
Get the approval configuration for a merge request: total required approvals, list of users who already approved, suggested approvers, and whether the current user has approved. Use this to see who approved. For rule-level status, use gitlab_mr_approval_state.

Returns: JSON with approval configuration, approvers, and approval status. See also: gitlab_mr_get, gitlab_mr_approval_state.

name: gitlab_mr_approval_reset
description:
Reset all approvals on a GitLab merge request. Requires project_id and mr_iid.

Returns: confirmation message.

See also: gitlab_mr_approval_rules_list.

name: gitlab_mr_approval_rule_create
description:
Create an approval rule on a GitLab merge request. Specify the rule name, required approvals, and optionally user/group IDs.

Returns: JSON with the created approval rule details. See also: gitlab_mr_approval_rules.

approval_project_rule_id.description: Project-level approval rule ID to inherit from

name: gitlab_mr_approval_rule_delete
description:
Delete an approval rule from a GitLab merge request. Requires project_id, mr_iid, and approval_rule_id.

Returns: confirmation message. See also: gitlab_mr_approval_rules.

name: gitlab_mr_approval_rule_update
description:
Update an existing approval rule on a GitLab merge request. Modify the rule name, required approvals, or user/group IDs.

Returns: JSON with the updated approval rule details. See also: gitlab_mr_approval_rules.

name: gitlab_mr_approval_rules
description:
List the approval rules configured for a merge request: rule names, types (regular, code_owner, any_approver), required approval count, current approvers, and eligible approvers. Use this to understand the rule configuration. For overall approval status, use gitlab_mr_approval_state instead.

Returns: JSON with approval rules, required counts, and eligible approvers. See also: gitlab_mr_approval_config.

name: gitlab_mr_approval_state
description:
Get the overall approval state of a merge request: whether it is approved, which rules are satisfied or pending, and whether rules have been overridden. This is the primary tool for checking 'can this MR be merged?'. For editing approval rules, use gitlab_mr_approval_rules. For who approved, use gitlab_mr_approval_config.

Returns: JSON with the overall approval state and rule satisfaction status. See also: gitlab_mr_get, gitlab_mr_approval_rules.

name: gitlab_mr_approve
description:
Approve a GitLab merge request. Adds the authenticated user's approval to the merge request's approval list.

Returns: JSON with approval details including approved_by list. See also: gitlab_mr_get, gitlab_mr_approval_rules.

name: gitlab_mr_cancel_auto_merge
description:
Cancel the 'merge when pipeline succeeds' (auto-merge) setting on a GitLab merge request. Returns the updated merge request details. Requires appropriate permissions; returns 405 if already merged/closed or 406 if auto-merge was not enabled.

Returns: JSON with the updated merge request details. See also: gitlab_mr_merge.

name: gitlab_mr_changes_get
description:
Get the current file diffs (changes) for a merge request. This is the primary tool for viewing MR changes. Returns old/new paths, diff content, file status (added/deleted/renamed), and file modes. For historical diff versions use gitlab_mr_diff_versions_list. For raw git-apply format use gitlab_mr_raw_diffs.

Returns: JSON with file diffs and change metadata. See also: gitlab_mr_get, gitlab_mr_discussion_create.

name: gitlab_mr_commits
description:
List all commits in a GitLab merge request. Returns commit ID, title, author, date, and web URL with pagination.

Returns: JSON array of commits with pagination. Fields include id, title, author_name, authored_date, and web_url. See also: gitlab_mr_get, gitlab_commit_get.

name: gitlab_mr_create
description:
Create a new merge request in a GitLab project. Requires source and target branch names.
